user_prompt: Another thing I would like to do is start working on publishing our learnings on the AST related work to our research directory located at ~/research; I would like to build out there the same type of paper grounded in the implementation, artefacts, data that we will generate and record in a new subdirectory there. Build out a paper in the same fashion as the other papers so that I may publish it. Do the deep research to see what I did in my other papers and help me build out my idea here in a similar method. Rigorous scientific method indeed.
